---
title: "H1A Final"

We utilize continous micronutrient status variables and examine associations to telomere length at 28 months. 
The function "fit_RE_GLM" is used to model a GLM for each exposure and outcome pair. Covariate pre-screening and selection is built into the model code. 

The data was subseted to only the variables utilized for code optimization and reduce run-time. 
---

```{r}
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(washbgam)
  library(washb)
  library(devtools)
  library(here)
  library(ggplot2)
  
  install.packages("car")
  library(car)
  
  
  setwd("/Users/sumuccu/Micronutrient-Telomere")
  
  rm(list=ls())
  
  source(here("0-config.R"))
  
  d <- read.csv("/Users/sumuccu/Desktop/bangladesh-merged-eed-mn-data.csv")
  
  #glm function
  fit_RE_glm <- function (d, Y, X, W = NULL, forcedW = NULL, V = NULL, id = "clusterid", family = "gaussian", pval = 0.2, print = TRUE){
    
    cat("\nNon-prescreened covariates: ", paste(forcedW, 
                                                sep = "", collapse = ", "), "\n")
    set.seed(12345)
    require(mgcv)
    require(dplyr)
    require(faraway)
    if (!is.null(V)) {
      require(lmtest)
    }
    if (!is.null(W)) {
      W <- subset(d, select = W)
    }
    Y <- subset(d, select = Y)
    colnames(Y) <- "Y"
    X <- subset(d, select = X)
    colnames(X) <- "X"
    id <- subset(d, select = id)
    colnames(id) <- "id"
    if (!is.null(V)) {
      Vvar <- subset(d, select = V)
      colnames(Vvar) <- "V"
    }
    else {
      Vvar <- data.frame(V = rep(1, nrow(d)))
    }
    collinear_vars <- NULL
    if (!is.null(W)) {
      gamdat <- data.frame(Y, X, id, Vvar, W)
    }
    else {
      gamdat <- data.frame(Y, X, id, Vvar)
    }
    if (!is.null(W)) {
      if (sum(is.na(forcedW)) != 0) {
        colnamesW <- names(W)
      }
      else {
        if (is.null(forcedW)) {
          Wnames <- names(W)
          forcedW <- c(Wnames[Wnames == "tr" | grepl("age_", 
                                                     Wnames) | grepl("agedays_", Wnames) | 
                                grepl("ageday_", Wnames)])
        }
        cat("\nNon-prescreened covariates: ", paste(forcedW, 
                                                    sep = "", collapse = ", "), "\n")
        colnamesW <- names(W)[!(names(W) %in% forcedW)]
      }
      screenW <- subset(gamdat, select = colnamesW)
    }
    else {
      screenW <- NULL
    }
    if (!is.null(screenW)) {
      if (print == TRUE) {
        cat("\n-----------------------------------------\nPre-screening the adjustment covariates:\n-----------------------------------------\n")
      }
      suppressWarnings(Wscreen <- washb_prescreen(Y = gamdat$Y, 
                                                  Ws = screenW, family = family, pval = pval, print = print))
      if (!is.null(forcedW)) {
        Wscreen <- c(as.character(Wscreen), as.character(forcedW))
      }
      W <- subset(gamdat, select = Wscreen)
      Wdf <- W
      Wdf$constant <- rep(1, nrow(gamdat))
      for (i in 1:ncol(W)) {
        tmp <- glm(constant ~ ., data = Wdf, family = family)
        todrop <- NULL
        todrop <- try(suppressWarnings(names(tmp$coefficients)[-1][as.vector(vif(tmp)) > 10][1]))
        if (!is.null(todrop) & !is.na(todrop)) {
          collinear_vars <- c(collinear_vars, todrop)
          Wdf <- Wdf[, colnames(Wdf) != todrop]
        }
      }
      to_keep <- colnames(W)[!(colnames(W) %in% collinear_vars)]
      if (length(to_keep) != length(colnames(W))) {
        cat("\nDropped for collinearity with other covariates:\n", 
            colnames(W)[!(colnames(W) %in% to_keep)])
      }
      W_processed <- W[which(colnames(W) %in% to_keep)]
      Wscreen <- colnames(W_processed)
      cat("\n\nCovariated included in model:\n", Wscreen)
    }
    else {
      Wscreen = NULL
    }
    if (!is.null(Wscreen)) {
      d <- subset(gamdat, select = c("Y", "X", 
                                     "id", "V", Wscreen))
    }
    else {
      d <- subset(gamdat, select = c("Y", "X", 
                                     "id", "V"))
    }
    fullrows <- nrow(d)
    d <- d %>% filter(!is.na(Y))
    Yrows <- nrow(d)
    cat("\nRows dropped due to missing outcome: ", fullrows - 
          Yrows, "\n")
    d <- d %>% filter(!is.na(X))
    Xrows <- nrow(d)
    cat("Rows dropped due to missing exposure: ", Yrows - 
          Xrows, "\n")
    if (!is.null(W) & length(Wscreen) > 0) {
      cat("Percent missingness by covariate:\n")
      print(sapply(d[, -c(1:3)], function(x) round(sum(is.na(x))/nrow(X) * 
                                                     100, 1)))
      d <- d[complete.cases(d), ]
      cat("\nRows dropped due to missing covariates: ", 
          Xrows - nrow(d), "\n")
    }
    cat("Final sample size: ", nrow(d), "\n")
    d$dummy <- 1
    if (!is.null(W) & length(Wscreen) > 0) {
      Ws <- subset(gamdat, select = c(Wscreen))
      W_factors <- colnames(Ws)[(grepl("factor", sapply(Ws, 
                                                        class)) | grepl("character", sapply(Ws, class)))]
      W_numeric <- colnames(Ws)[(grepl("integer", sapply(Ws, 
                                                         class)) | grepl("numeric", sapply(Ws, class)))]
      indicator_vec <- rep(TRUE, length(W_numeric))
      for (i in 1:length(W_numeric)) {
        N_unique <- length(unique(Ws[, W_numeric[i]]))
        if (N_unique > 20) {
          indicator_vec[i] <- FALSE
        }
      }
      W_indicator <- W_numeric[indicator_vec]
      W_continious <- W_numeric[!indicator_vec]
      if (length(W_continious) > 0) {
        eq_num <- paste0(W_continious, 
                         collapse = " + ")
      }
      else {
        eq_num = NULL
      }
      if (length(W_factors) + length(W_indicator) > 0) {
        eq_fact <- paste0(" + ", paste0(c(W_factors, 
                                          W_indicator), collapse = " + "))
      }
      else {
        eq_fact = NULL
      }
      if (length(unique(d$X)) > 2) {
        if (!is.null(V)) {
          form <- paste0("Y~X + V + X*V+", 
                         eq_fact, " +", eq_num, "+ s(id,bs=\"re\",by=dummy)")
          form <- gsub("+ +", "+", form, fixed = TRUE)
          equation <- as.formula(form)
          form_null <- paste0("Y~X + V + ", 
                              eq_fact, " +", eq_num, "+ s(id,bs=\"re\",by=dummy)")
          form_null <- gsub("+ +", "+", form_null, 
                            fixed = TRUE)
          equation_null <- as.formula(form_null)
        }
        else {
          form <- paste0("Y~X+", eq_fact, 
                         " +", eq_num, "+ s(id,bs=\"re\",by=dummy)")
          form <- gsub("+ +", "+", form, fixed = TRUE)
          equation <- as.formula(form)
        }
      }
      else {
        if (!is.null(V)) {
          form <- paste0("Y~X+ V + X*V +", eq_fact, 
                         " +", eq_num, "+ s(id,bs=\"re\",by=dummy)")
          form <- gsub("+ +", "+", form, fixed = TRUE)
          equation <- as.formula(form)
          form_null <- paste0("Y~X+ V + ", eq_fact, 
                              " +", eq_num, "+ s(id,bs=\"re\",by=dummy)")
          form_null <- gsub("+ +", "+", form_null, 
                            fixed = TRUE)
          equation_null <- as.formula(form_null)
        }
        else {
          form <- paste0("Y~X+", eq_fact, " +", 
                         eq_num, "+ s(id,bs=\"re\",by=dummy)")
          form <- gsub("+ +", "+", form, fixed = TRUE)
          equation <- as.formula(form)
        }
      }
      fit <- mgcv::gam(formula = equation, data = d)
      if (!is.null(V)) {
        fit_null <- mgcv::gam(formula = equation_null, data = d)
        LRp <- lrtest(fit, fit_null)[2, 5]
      }
    }
    else {
      if (length(unique(d$X)) > 2) {
        if (!is.null(V)) {
          equation <- as.formula(paste0("Y~X + V + X*V + s(id,bs=\"re\",by=dummy)"))
          fit <- mgcv::gam(formula = equation, data = d)
          equation_null <- as.formula(paste0("Y~X + V + s(id,bs=\"re\",by=dummy)"))
          fit_null <- mgcv::gam(formula = equation_null, 
                                data = d)
          LRp <- lrtest(fit, fit_null)[2, 5]
        }
        else {
          fit <- mgcv::gam(Y ~ s(X, bs = "cr") + 
                             s(id, bs = "re", by = dummy), data = d)
        }
      }
      else {
        if (!is.null(V)) {
          equation <- as.formula(paste0("Y~X + V + X*V + s(id,bs=\"re\",by=dummy)"))
          fit <- mgcv::gam(formula = equation, data = d)
          equation_null <- as.formula(paste0("Y~X + V + s(id,bs=\"re\",by=dummy)"))
          fit_null <- mgcv::gam(formula = equation_null, 
                                data = d)
          LRp <- lrtest(fit, fit_null)[2, 5]
        }
        else {
          fit <- mgcv::gam(Y ~ X + s(id, bs = "re", 
                                     by = dummy), data = d)
        }
      }
    }
    if (!is.null(V)) {
      cat("\nInteraction p-value: ", LRp, "\n")
      return(list(fit = fit, dat = d, int.p = LRp, covars = Wscreen, 
                  collinear_vars = collinear_vars))
    }
    else {
      return(list(fit = fit, dat = d, covars = Wscreen, collinear_vars = collinear_vars))
    }
  }
  
  predict_glm_diff <- function(fit, d, quantile_diff = c(0.25, 0.75), Xvar, Yvar, binaryX = FALSE){
    
    res <- summary(fit)
    res <- res$p.table[2,]
    res <- data.frame(t(res))
    
  lb.diff <- res$Estimate - 1.96 * res$Std..Error
  ub.diff <- res$Estimate + 1.96 * res$Std..Error
  res <- data.frame(Y = Yvar, X = Xvar, N = nrow(d), q1 = NA, 
                    q3 = NA, pred.q1 = NA, pred.q3 = NA, 
                    point.diff=res$Estimate, lb.diff = lb.diff, ub.diff = ub.diff, Pval = res$Pr...t..)
  
  return(list(res = res))
}

fit_RE_GAM <- function(d, Y, X, W = NULL, id = "clusterid", family = gaussian(), k = 5) {
  model_vars <- c(Y, X, id, W)
  dat <- d %>%
    select(all_of(model_vars)) %>%
    filter(complete.cases(.)) %>%
    rename(Y = all_of(Y), X = all_of(X), id = all_of(id))
  
  dat$id <- as.factor(dat$id)
  x_unique <- length(unique(dat$X))
  smooth_k <- min(k, max(4, x_unique - 1))
  
  x_term <- if (x_unique > 4) {
    paste0("s(X, bs = \"cr\", k = ", smooth_k, ")")
  } else {
    "X"
  }
  
  covar_term <- if (!is.null(W) && length(W) > 0) {
    paste(W, collapse = " + ")
  } else {
    NULL
  }
  
  rhs_terms <- c(x_term, covar_term, "s(id, bs = \"re\")")
  form <- as.formula(paste("Y ~", paste(rhs_terms, collapse = " + ")))
  fit <- mgcv::gam(form, data = dat, family = family, method = "REML")
  
  list(
    fit = fit,
    dat = dat,
    used_smooth = x_unique > 4
  )
}

extract_gam_sensitivity <- function(fit_obj, Xvar, Yvar) {
  fit_summary <- summary(fit_obj$fit)
  
  if (isTRUE(fit_obj$used_smooth) && nrow(fit_summary$s.table) > 0) {
    smooth_stats <- fit_summary$s.table[1, ]
    data.frame(
      X = Xvar,
      Y = Yvar,
      N = nrow(fit_obj$dat),
      term_type = "smooth",
      edf = unname(smooth_stats["edf"]),
      ref.df = unname(smooth_stats["Ref.df"]),
      statistic = unname(smooth_stats["F"]),
      pval = unname(smooth_stats["p-value"])
    )
  } else {
    param_stats <- fit_summary$p.table["X", ]
    data.frame(
      X = Xvar,
      Y = Yvar,
      N = nrow(fit_obj$dat),
      term_type = "linear",
      edf = NA_real_,
      ref.df = NA_real_,
      statistic = unname(param_stats["t value"]),
      pval = unname(param_stats["Pr(>|t|)"])
    )
  }
}

build_gam_curve_data <- function(fit_obj, Xvar, Yvar) {
  dat <- fit_obj$dat
  x_seq <- seq(min(dat$X), max(dat$X), length.out = 200)
  newdat <- dat[rep(1, length(x_seq)), , drop = FALSE]
  newdat$X <- x_seq
  newdat$id <- dat$id[1]
  
  covars <- setdiff(names(newdat), c("Y", "X", "id"))
  for (covar in covars) {
    if (is.numeric(dat[[covar]]) || is.integer(dat[[covar]])) {
      newdat[[covar]] <- median(dat[[covar]], na.rm = TRUE)
    } else {
      mode_value <- names(sort(table(dat[[covar]]), decreasing = TRUE))[1]
      if (is.factor(dat[[covar]])) {
        newdat[[covar]] <- factor(mode_value, levels = levels(dat[[covar]]))
      } else {
        newdat[[covar]] <- mode_value
      }
    }
  }
  
  preds <- predict(
    fit_obj$fit,
    newdata = newdat,
    se.fit = TRUE,
    exclude = "s(id)"
  )
  
  data.frame(
    X = x_seq,
    fit = preds$fit,
    se = preds$se.fit,
    lb = preds$fit - 1.96 * preds$se.fit,
    ub = preds$fit + 1.96 * preds$se.fit,
    Xvar = Xvar,
    Yvar = Yvar
  )
}

build_gam_reference_data <- function(fit_obj, x_values) {
  dat <- fit_obj$dat
  newdat <- dat[rep(1, length(x_values)), , drop = FALSE]
  newdat$X <- x_values
  newdat$id <- dat$id[1]
  
  covars <- setdiff(names(newdat), c("Y", "X", "id"))
  for (covar in covars) {
    if (is.numeric(dat[[covar]]) || is.integer(dat[[covar]])) {
      newdat[[covar]] <- median(dat[[covar]], na.rm = TRUE)
    } else {
      mode_value <- names(sort(table(dat[[covar]]), decreasing = TRUE))[1]
      if (is.factor(dat[[covar]])) {
        newdat[[covar]] <- factor(mode_value, levels = levels(dat[[covar]]))
      } else {
        newdat[[covar]] <- mode_value
      }
    }
  }
  
  newdat
}

extract_gam_percentile_contrast <- function(fit_obj, Xvar, Yvar, probs = c(0.10, 0.90)) {
  dat <- fit_obj$dat
  q_vals <- as.numeric(stats::quantile(dat$X, probs = probs, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE))
  newdat <- build_gam_reference_data(fit_obj, x_values = q_vals)
  
  pred_fit <- predict(fit_obj$fit, newdata = newdat, type = "response")
  Xp <- predict(fit_obj$fit, newdata = newdat, type = "lpmatrix")
  re_cols <- grepl("^s\\(id\\)", colnames(Xp))
  if (any(re_cols)) {
    Xp[, re_cols] <- 0
  }
  
  diff_vec <- Xp[2, ] - Xp[1, ]
  vc <- stats::vcov(fit_obj$fit)
  diff_est <- as.numeric(pred_fit[2] - pred_fit[1])
  diff_se <- sqrt(as.numeric(diff_vec %*% vc %*% diff_vec))
  
  data.frame(
    X = Xvar,
    Y = Yvar,
    N = nrow(dat),
    q10 = q_vals[1],
    q90 = q_vals[2],
    pred_q10 = as.numeric(pred_fit[1]),
    pred_q90 = as.numeric(pred_fit[2]),
    point_diff = diff_est,
    lb_diff = diff_est - 1.96 * diff_se,
    ub_diff = diff_est + 1.96 * diff_se,
    pval_diff = 2 * stats::pnorm(abs(diff_est / diff_se), lower.tail = FALSE)
  )
}

```

Analysis + Plotting code 

```{r}

#subset data to only what is needed

d <- d %>%
  select(logFER_inf, hemo_eeel, hepcidin_eeel, logsTFR_inf, logRBP_inf, logB12, logfolate, clusterid, TS_t3_Z, sex, age, birthord, momage, momheight, momedu, hfiacat, Nlt18, Ncomp, watmin, walls, floor, HHwealth_scaled, tr, life_viol_any_t3_cat, viol_any_preg_cat)

Xvars <- c(
  "logFER_inf",
  "hemo_eeel",
  "hepcidin_eeel",
  "logsTFR_inf",
  "logRBP_inf",
  "logB12",
  "logfolate"
)       

Yvars <- "TS_t3_Z"

#Set list of adjustment variables

Wvars <- c(
  "sex", "age", "birthord", "momage", "momheight", "momedu",
  "hfiacat", "Nlt18", "Ncomp", "watmin", "HHwealth_scaled",
  "tr", "life_viol_any_t3_cat", "viol_any_preg_cat"
)

res_unadj <- NULL
for(i in Xvars){
  for(j in Yvars){
    print(i)
    temp <- fit_washb_glm(d=d, Y=j, X=i, W=NULL)
    temp$X <- i
    temp$Y <- j
    print(temp)
    res_unadj <- bind_rows(res_unadj, temp)
  }}

res_adj <- NULL
for(i in Xvars){
  for(j in Yvars){
    print(i)
    temp <- fit_washb_glm(d=d, Y=j, X=i, W=Wvars)
    temp$X <- i
    temp$Y <- j
    print(temp)
    res_adj <- bind_rows(res_adj, temp)
  }}


#Create new variable names!

figure_names <- c(
  logFER_inf = "Ferritin (\u00b5g/L)",
  hemo_eeel = "Hemoglobin (g/dL)",
  hepcidin_eeel = "Hepcidin (ng/mL)",
  logsTFR_inf = "sTfR (mg/L)",
  logRBP_inf = "RBP (\u00b5mol/L)",
  logB12 = "Vitamin B12 (pmol/L)",
  logfolate = "Folate (nmol/L)",
  TS_t3_Z = "Telomere length z-score"
)

# Create new variable names
figure_names <- c(
  logFER_inf = "Ferritin (\u00b5g/L)",
  hemo_eeel = "Hemoglobin (g/dL)",
  hepcidin_eeel = "Hepcidin (ng/mL)",
  logsTFR_inf = "sTfR (mg/L)",
  logRBP_inf = "RBP (\u00b5mol/L)",
  logB12 = "Vitamin B12 (pmol/L)",
  logfolate = "Folate (nmol/L)",
  TS_t3_Z = "Telomere length z-score"
)

# Make plotting copies so you do not overwrite originals
res_unadj_plot <- res_unadj %>%
  mutate(
    X = ifelse(X %in% names(figure_names), figure_names[X], X),
    Y = ifelse(Y %in% names(figure_names), figure_names[Y], Y)
  )

res_adj_plot <- res_adj %>%
  mutate(
    X = ifelse(X %in% names(figure_names), figure_names[X], X),
    Y = ifelse(Y %in% names(figure_names), figure_names[Y], Y)
  )

p_unadj <- ggplot(res_unadj_plot, aes(x = X, y = coef)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = analysis_palette["primary"]) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lb, ymax = ub), width = 0.75, linewidth = 1, color = analysis_palette["primary"]) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = analysis_palette["neutral"], linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~Y, ncol = 2, scales = "free") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(y = "Mean difference", x = "Micronutrient biomarkers") +
  ggtitle("") +
  theme_analysis_plot() +
  theme(
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(vjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = ggtext::element_markdown(),
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines")
  )

p_adj <- ggplot(res_adj_plot, aes(x = X, y = coef)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = analysis_palette["primary"]) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lb, ymax = ub), width = 0.75, linewidth = 1, color = analysis_palette["primary"]) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = analysis_palette["neutral"], linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~Y, ncol = 2, scales = "free") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(y = "Adjusted mean difference", x = "Micronutrient biomarkers") +
  ggtitle("") +
  theme_analysis_plot() +
  theme(
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(vjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = ggtext::element_markdown(),
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines")
  )

write.csv(res_unadj, here("results/H1Aunadj_results.csv"))
write.csv(res_adj, here("results/H1Aadj_results.csv"))


ggsave(here("results/H1Aforest_plot_unadj.png"), p_unadj, width=5, height=5, dpi=600)
ggsave(here("results/H1Aforest_plot_adj.png"), p_adj, width=5, height=5, dpi=600)
```

```{r}
# Create folders to save plots
dir.create(here("results/H1Ascatterplots_unadj"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(here("results/H1Ascatterplots_adj"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

adjusted_plot_list <- list()

for(i in Xvars){
  for(j in Yvars){
    
    # Data for this X/Y pair
    df_plot <- d %>%
      select(all_of(c(i, j, Wvars))) %>%
      filter(!is.na(.data[[i]]), !is.na(.data[[j]]))
    
# -------------------
# Unadjusted plot
# -------------------
    p_unadj <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = .data[[i]], y = .data[[j]])) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.35, color = analysis_palette["neutral"]) +
      geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = analysis_palette["primary"], fill = analysis_palette["fill"]) +
      theme_analysis_plot() +
      labs(
        title = paste(figure_names[j], "vs", figure_names[i]),
        x = figure_names[i],
        y = figure_names[j]
      ) +
      theme(legend.position = "none")
    
    ggsave(
      here("results/H1Ascatterplots_unadj", paste0("unadj_", j, "_", i, ".png")),
      p_unadj, width = 5, height = 4, dpi = 600
    )
    
# -------------------
# Adjusted plot
# -------------------
    df_adj <- df_plot %>% filter(complete.cases(.))
    
    form_adj <- as.formula(
      paste(j, "~", i, "+", paste(Wvars, collapse = " + "))
    )
    fit_adj <- lm(form_adj, data = df_adj)
    
    newdat <- data.frame(seq(min(df_adj[[i]], na.rm = TRUE),
                             max(df_adj[[i]], na.rm = TRUE),
                             length.out = 100))
    names(newdat) <- i
    
    for(w in Wvars){
      if(is.numeric(df_adj[[w]]) || is.integer(df_adj[[w]])){
        newdat[[w]] <- mean(df_adj[[w]], na.rm = TRUE)
      } else {
        newdat[[w]] <- names(sort(table(df_adj[[w]]), decreasing = TRUE))[1]
      }
    }
    
    newdat$pred <- predict(fit_adj, newdata = newdat)
    
    p_adj <- ggplot(df_adj, aes(x = .data[[i]], y = .data[[j]])) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.35, color = analysis_palette["neutral"]) +
      geom_line(data = newdat, aes(x = .data[[i]], y = pred), linewidth = 1, color = analysis_palette["primary"]) +
      theme_analysis_plot() +
      labs(
        title = paste(figure_names[j], "vs", figure_names[i]),
        x = figure_names[i],
        y = figure_names[j]
      ) +
      theme(legend.position = "none")

    adjusted_plot_list[[i]] <- p_adj
    
    ggsave(
      here("results/H1Ascatterplots_adj", paste0("adj_", j, "_", i, ".png")),
      p_adj, width = 5, height = 4, dpi = 600
    )
  }
}

p_adj_combined <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  plotlist = adjusted_plot_list,
  labels = LETTERS[seq_along(adjusted_plot_list)],
  label_size = 12,
  label_fontface = "bold",
  ncol = 2,
  align = "hv"
)

ggsave(
  here("results", "H1A Final", "H1A_scatterplots_adj_combined.png"),
  p_adj_combined,
  width = 10,
  height = 14,
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r}
# H1A sensitivity analysis: random-effects GAM with smooth micronutrient terms
dir.create(here("results", "H1A Final", "sensitivity"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

h1a_gam_unadj <- NULL
h1a_gam_adj <- NULL
h1a_gam_curves <- NULL
h1a_gam_pct_contrasts <- NULL

for (i in Xvars) {
  for (j in Yvars) {
    fit_unadj <- fit_RE_GAM(d = d, Y = j, X = i, W = NULL)
    fit_adj <- fit_RE_GAM(d = d, Y = j, X = i, W = Wvars)
    
    h1a_gam_unadj <- bind_rows(
      h1a_gam_unadj,
      extract_gam_sensitivity(fit_unadj, Xvar = i, Yvar = j) %>%
        mutate(model = "unadjusted")
    )
    
    h1a_gam_adj <- bind_rows(
      h1a_gam_adj,
      extract_gam_sensitivity(fit_adj, Xvar = i, Yvar = j) %>%
        mutate(model = "adjusted")
    )
    
    curve_unadj <- build_gam_curve_data(fit_unadj, Xvar = i, Yvar = j) %>%
      mutate(model = "unadjusted")
    curve_adj <- build_gam_curve_data(fit_adj, Xvar = i, Yvar = j) %>%
      mutate(model = "adjusted")
    
    pct_unadj <- extract_gam_percentile_contrast(fit_unadj, Xvar = i, Yvar = j) %>%
      mutate(model = "unadjusted")
    pct_adj <- extract_gam_percentile_contrast(fit_adj, Xvar = i, Yvar = j) %>%
      mutate(model = "adjusted")
    
    h1a_gam_curves <- bind_rows(h1a_gam_curves, curve_unadj, curve_adj)
    h1a_gam_pct_contrasts <- bind_rows(h1a_gam_pct_contrasts, pct_unadj, pct_adj)
    
    plot_curves <- bind_rows(curve_unadj, curve_adj) %>%
      mutate(
        model = factor(model, levels = c("unadjusted", "adjusted")),
        X_label = figure_names[i],
        Y_label = figure_names[j]
      )
    
    p_gam <- ggplot(plot_curves, aes(x = X, y = fit, color = model, fill = model)) +
      geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lb, ymax = ub), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
      geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
      facet_wrap(~model, ncol = 1) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c(unadjusted = analysis_palette["primary"], adjusted = analysis_palette["secondary"])) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c(unadjusted = analysis_palette["fill"], adjusted = "#FDD0A2")) +
      theme_analysis_plot() +
      labs(
        title = paste0("RE-GAM sensitivity: ", figure_names[j], " vs ", figure_names[i]),
        x = figure_names[i],
        y = figure_names[j],
        color = NULL,
        fill = NULL
      ) +
      theme(legend.position = "none")
    
    ggsave(
      here("results", "H1A Final", "sensitivity", paste0("H1A_RE_GAM_", j, "_", i, ".png")),
      p_gam,
      width = 5,
      height = 6,
      dpi = 600
    )
  }
}

h1a_gam_sensitivity <- bind_rows(h1a_gam_unadj, h1a_gam_adj) %>%
  mutate(
    X_label = figure_names[X],
    Y_label = figure_names[Y]
  ) %>%
  select(model, X, X_label, Y, Y_label, N, term_type, edf, ref.df, statistic, pval)

h1a_gam_pct_contrasts <- h1a_gam_pct_contrasts %>%
  mutate(
    X_label = figure_names[X],
    Y_label = figure_names[Y],
    contrast = "P90 vs P10"
  ) %>%
  select(model, contrast, X, X_label, Y, Y_label, N, q10, q90, pred_q10, pred_q90, point_diff, lb_diff, ub_diff, pval_diff)

write.csv(
  h1a_gam_sensitivity,
  here("results", "H1A Final", "sensitivity", "H1A_RE_GAM_sensitivity.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

write.csv(
  h1a_gam_pct_contrasts,
  here("results", "H1A Final", "sensitivity", "H1A_RE_GAM_percentile_contrasts.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE
)

saveRDS(
  h1a_gam_curves,
  here("figure-data", "H1A_RE_GAM_curve_data.RDS")
)

saveRDS(
  h1a_gam_pct_contrasts,
  here("figure-data", "H1A_RE_GAM_percentile_contrasts.RDS")
)

h1a_gam_pct_plot <- h1a_gam_pct_contrasts %>%
  filter(model == "adjusted") %>%
  mutate(
    X_label = factor(X_label, levels = sort(unique(X_label)))
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = X_label, y = point_diff)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = analysis_palette["secondary"]) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lb_diff, ymax = ub_diff), width = 0.5, linewidth = 1, color = analysis_palette["secondary"]) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = analysis_palette["neutral"], linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_analysis_plot() +
  labs(
    title = "H1A sensitivity analysis",
    subtitle = "Adjusted predicted difference in telomere length z-score: 90th vs 10th percentile",
    x = "Micronutrient biomarker",
    y = "Adjusted mean difference in telomere length z-score"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave(
  here("results", "H1A Final", "sensitivity", "H1A_RE_GAM_percentile_contrast_plot.png"),
  h1a_gam_pct_plot,
  width = 7,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 600
)

h1a_gam_pct_contrasts
```
